currentPhase.name: Waning Gibbous
currentPhase.phaseInterpretation: Waning Gibbous supports reflection, integration, and thoughtful refinement before release.
currentPhase.signInterpretation: Moon in Libra highlights harmony, relationships, and emotional balance through fair choices.

upcomingEvents.description: A deep emotional checkpoint calls for honest release and stronger boundaries.
Quiet closure energy supports rest, perspective, and spiritual reset.
Grounding choices help stabilize money, routines, and personal values.
Restore emotional clarity through simple, balanced decisions.
Set powerful intentions and commit to a clean personal reset.
Material priorities and emotional security themes come into sharp focus.
